# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE Trigger Pattern Efficacy

**Source:** Leaderboard #3 V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE (2026-05-21) + deduped correction data

## Trigger Pattern Breakdown (High-Conf Bear, Score=10)

| Trigger Pattern | N | WR | P&L | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `level_rejection + ribbon_flip + confluence` | 17 | 88% | +$980 | Core base pattern |
| `level_rejection + trendline_rejection + confluence` | 15 | 87% | +$245 | Alternate 3rd trigger |
| **All high-conf bear (any 3-trigger combo)** | 33 | 84.8% | +$1,173 | Raw (includes duplicates) |

## VIX_15-20 (MODERATE) Sub-Tier Performance

| Dataset | N | WR | P&L | Loss Count |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Raw | 18 | **100%** | +$871 | **0** |
| Deduped (L67) | 8 | 87.5% | +$~500 | 1 (2/27, VIX=19.32) |

**Key finding:** Confluence is MANDATORY in ALL winning patterns. The 18 raw obs with score=10 + VIX_15-20 had ZERO losses. The deduped 8 obs had 1 loss at VIX=19.32 (near the VIX_15-20 ceiling).

## Loss Analysis (All High-Conf Bear)

| Date | Time | VIX | Pattern | P&L |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2025-02-27 | 11:00 | 19.32 | level_rejection + ribbon_flip + confluence | -$35 |
| (4 other losses) | — | ≥17.82 | Same patterns | -$102 total |

**Critical insight:** All losses occurred at VIX ≥ 17.82 (boundary between VIX_15-20 and VIX_20-25). The VIX_15-20 regime is the purity filter.

## Confluence Requirement Impact

**Current state:** All high-conf observations ALREADY require confluence (it's part of the score=10 definition).

**Proposed refinement:** Add VIX ceiling as secondary filter within high-conf tier.

| Filter Configuration | Deduped N | WR | P&L | Delta vs Baseline |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Score=10 only | 16 | 81.3% | +$695 | — |
| Score=10 + VIX_15-20 | 8 | 87.5% | +$~500 | -$195 but tighter |
| Score=10 + VIX_15-20 + **VIX ceiling < 19.0** | ~6 | 100% | +$~350 | Pure |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A — watcher quality gate, no direct trade sizing
2. **Sample bias:** N=16 deduped high-conf bear obs from 16-month window; concentration: 5/04 (J-winner day) = 50%+ of P&L
3. **Out-of-sample:** NOT YET RUN — requires dedicated OOS walk-forward on VIX-ceiling variant
4. **Real-fills:** NOT YET RUN — need to validate VIX-ceiling filter against OPRA fills
5. **Failure modes:** VIX ceiling too tight → 0 fires in elevated-VIX bear regimes (VIX 20-25 had WR=57%, still +EV)
6. **Concentration:** Top-2 dates = 59.8% of raw P&L (5/04 + 5/15); deduped reduces this significantly
